calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for and with Jacqueline Lee and for Angie Lum. Sheila Robello Guardian Ad Litem for Devon Kimoto (Minor).

Ms. Zacharin and Ms. Robello spoke of the settlor's (Ms. Lum) intent to distribute outright to her two Children and what the material purpose was. The Court expressed concern stating that it does not know what Mr. Lum's intent was. The Petition for Order Approving Modification to Trust Terms was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

To Advance Hearing Date On Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Advanced From Jun-18-14 To Jun-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Continued To Jul-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for Angela Lum.

Counsel presented oral argument to support her position with regard to the issue of there being no need for appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem for the Children, referred to Probate Code 15804 with respect to the notice issue and explained how the Trust is to be distributed. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms was continued to July 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an ex parte petition for appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Ex Parte Application To Advance Hearing Date And Order Shortening Time For Service On Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
